chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1509 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhat, Advocate along with petitioners Agha Ather Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State Inspector Gulzar Ali SIO Police Station, Faiz Muhammad Narejo. >>>>>..<<<<< Inspector Gulzar Ali, Investigating Officer Crime No.01/2025 of Police Station, Faiz Muhammad Narejo, District Khairpur is present and files statement. He submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.2, namely Mst. Najma Khatoon in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.1, namely Raja Odho with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst.Najma Khatoon, the Petitioner No.2, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of law having jurisdiction for disposed of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law.

Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
